comment: Development configuration. Copy this to ~/.scholarOS/config/dev.json and modify as needed.
disableToolsHelp: Set to true to disable tool calling for development. Useful when testing LLMs that don't support the tool_choice parameter (e.g., some OpenRouter models). When true, the AI assistant will respond with text only, without attempting to call tools.
showOnboardingHelp: Set to true to force-show the onboarding modal on every launch, regardless of completion state. Useful for iterating on onboarding UI/flow without resetting app.json.
